core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Luxury Fashion aesthetics with Industrial Reliability.
Content is King: Every product is an art piece.
Negative Space: Use whitespace as a luxury indicator.
design_philosophy.visual_style: The Modern Merchant - Clean, architectural, detailed.

grid_system.product_catalog: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-x-8 gap-y-16

buttons.default: rounded-sm font-accent tracking-widest uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-border/40 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500
cards.feature: p-8 bg-card border-l-2 border-secondary hover:bg-accent/20 transition-colors

inputs.style: rounded-none border-0 border-b-2 border-input bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

hero_backgrounds.alt: Luxury modern interior showing high-end lifestyle

home.layout: Hero Section (Full Height) -> Value Proposition -> Categories Grid (Bento) -> Featured Products -> Trust Signals -> Footer
home.notes: Use the kitchen image for hero with a dark overlay and gold text.

news.layout: Editorial Grid. Large featured article followed by 3-column grid.

appliances.notes: Clean, white background. Focus on product specs clarity.

crystal_products.notes: Use dark background sections to make crystals pop. Reference yitaicrystal.com but modernize it.

spare_parts.layout: Dense Data Table or Compact Grid.
spare_parts.notes: Reference albaztrading.com. Prioritize search and part numbers. Use monospace font for part numbers.

contact.layout: Split Screen. Left: Black background with Gold text (Address/Map). Right: White background with minimal form.
contact.notes: Form fields should be underlined style. Map should be grayscale.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic AI gradients. Use solid, deep colors or subtle noise.
DO NOT center text by default. Left align creates stronger hierarchy.
ALWAYS use data-testid on interactive elements.
ENSURE 8px border radius max for a sharp, professional look (or 0px for ultra-luxury).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge sonner`
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with the provided colors and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the layout wrapper with the specific font imports.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build pages component by component, strictly following the page_specific_rules.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: For the 'Crystal' page, if data is missing, mock 6 high-end crystal items.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: For 'Spare Parts', mock a table of 10 industrial parts with SKU, Name, and 'In Stock' status.
